title: Nominal cooling capacity 30RB192
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of 30RB192 is 193 kW under standard conditions.

title: Nominal cooling capacity 30RB802
summary: Nominal cooling capacity of 30RB802 is 753 kW under standard conditions.

title: Refrigerant charge circuit A 30RB192
summary: Refrigerant charge for circuit A of 30RB192 is 13 kg.

title: Compressor quantity circuit A 30RB192
summary: Circuit A of 30RB192 has 1 compressor.
evidence_quote:
压缩机数量
回路 A 台 1 2 2 3 3 4 3 4

title: Minimum capacity step 30RB192
summary: Minimum capacity step of 30RB192 is 33%.

title: Evaporator water volume 30RB192
summary: Evaporator water volume of 30RB192 is 110 liters.

title: Nominal water flow rate 30RB192
summary: Nominal water flow rate of 30RB192 is 9 l/s.

title: Nominal water pressure drop 30RB192
summary: Nominal water pressure drop of 30RB192 is 21 kPa.

title: Maximum water side pressure without hydraulic module
canonical_key_hint: maximum water side pressure without hydraulic module
summary: Maximum water side pressure without hydraulic module is 1000 kPa for all models.

summary: External static head for low pressure pump of 30RB192 is 91 kPa at nominal flow.

机外水头（低压, 名义流量
下）kPa 91 80 61 76 65 71 - -

title: External static head high pressure 30RB192
summary: External static head for high pressure pump of 30RB192 is 176 kPa at nominal flow.

title: Expansion tank capacity 30RB192
summary: Expansion tank capacity of 30RB192 is 50 liters.

canonical_key_hint: maximum water side pressure with hydraulic module
summary: Maximum water side pressure with built-in hydraulic module is 400 kPa.

块kPa 400 400 400 400 400 400 - -

title: Water connection diameter without hydraulic module 30RB192
canonical_key_hint: 30RB192 water connection diameter without hydraulic module
summary: Water connection outer diameter without hydraulic module for 30RB192 is 114.3 mm.

title: Unit power input 30RB192
summary: Unit power input of 30RB192 at nominal conditions is 70.6 kW.

title: Maximum operating current circuit A+B 30RB192
summary: Maximum operating current for circuits A+B of 30RB192 is 160.5 A.

title: Maximum starting current circuit A+B 30RB192
summary: Maximum starting current for circuits A+B of 30RB192 is 268 A.

title: Compressor electrical data SH240
summary: SH240 compressor has nominal current 30 A, max current 39 A, LRA 213 A, power factor 0.86.

title: Compressor electrical data SH300
summary: SH300 compressor has nominal current 38 A, max current 51 A, LRA 258 A, power factor 0.86.

title: Evaporator entering water temperature range
summary: Evaporator entering water temperature at startup: min 6.8°C, max 40°C.

title: Evaporator leaving water temperature range
summary: Evaporator leaving water temperature during operation: min 3.3°C, max 15°C.

title: Condenser entering air temperature range
summary: Condenser entering air temperature: min 0°C, max 48°C (standard).

title: Minimum water flow 30RB262
summary: Minimum water flow for 30RB262 is 3.5 l/s.

title: Maximum water flow 30RB262
summary: Maximum water flow for 30RB262 is 26.7 l/s (at 100 kPa pressure drop).

title: System water volume factor for air conditioning
canonical_key_hint: system water volume factor air conditioning
summary: Minimum system water volume for air conditioning is 2.5 L/kW of nominal capacity.

title: System water volume factor for process cooling
canonical_key_hint: system water volume factor process cooling
summary: Minimum system water volume for process cooling is 6.5 L/kW of nominal capacity.

title: Voltage unbalance limit
summary: Maximum allowable voltage unbalance is 2%.
evidence_quote:
如果机组的三相不平衡率超过 2%，或电流的不平衡率
超过 10%，请立即和当地的电力部门联系。

title: High pressure switch setting
summary: High pressure switch setting is 4520 kPa.
evidence_quote: 30RB机组装有高压保护开关，设定值为 4520Kpa 。

title: Maximum refrigerant side pressure evaporator
summary: Maximum operating pressure refrigerant side of evaporator is 2910 kPa.
evidence_quote:
最大运行压
力制冷剂侧是 2910Kpa

title: Maximum water side pressure evaporator
summary: Maximum operating pressure water side of evaporator is 1000 kPa.

title: R410A saturation pressure at 0°C
summary: Saturation pressure of R410A at 0°C is 700 kPa (relative).

title: R410A saturation pressure at 50°C
summary: Saturation pressure of R410A at 50°C is 2947 kPa (relative).

title: Heat recovery condenser water volume 30RB262
summary: Water volume of heat recovery condenser for 30RB262 is 22 liters.

title: Heat recovery condenser max water side pressure
canonical_key_hint: heat recovery condenser max water side pressure
summary: Maximum water side working pressure of heat recovery condenser is 1000 kPa.
evidence_quote: 水侧最大工作压力  Kpa 1000 1000 1000 1000

title: Heat recovery condenser water connection outer diameter 30RB262
canonical_key_hint: 30RB262 heat recovery condenser water connection outer diameter
summary: Water connection outer diameter of heat recovery condenser for 30RB262 is 88.9 mm.

title: Heat recovery entering water temperature range
canonical_key_hint: heat recovery entering water temperature range
summary: Heat recovery condenser entering water temperature at startup: min 20°C, max 55°C.

title: Heat recovery leaving water temperature range
canonical_key_hint: heat recovery leaving water temperature range
summary: Heat recovery condenser leaving water temperature during operation: min 20°C, max 55°C.

title: Condenser coil cleaning maintenance B
summary: Clean condenser coils with TOTALINE cleaning agent P902DT 05EE or P902CL 05EE, using low-pressure spray, along fin direction, opposite airflow, 25-30° angle, min 300mm distance.
evidence_quote:
用合适的清洗剂清洗盘管
我们建议用 TOTALINE 清洗剂清洗盘管
No.P902DT 05EE：传统的清洗方法
No.P902CL 05EE：清洗去油脂

title: Water filter cleaning procedure
summary: Clean water filter if pressure drop increases; close inlet/outlet valves, drain system, remove filter, clean, reinstall.
evidence_quote: 如果压降增加，则说明过滤器中有固体颗粒需要拆卸清洗。在关闭进出水口处的截止阀并排空系统中的水后拆下过滤器。

title: Compressor shipping flange removal
summary: Remove the shipping flange installed between compressor chassis and unit chassis before startup.
evidence_quote: 到现场后，此法兰必须取下。
